positive: A whimsical, central illustration of a stylized crescent moon embracing a cluster of bioluminescent fireflies and delicate stars. The scene uses a limited, high-contrast nocturnal palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and soft gold. The composition should feature clean, bold silhouettes and glowing energy trails against a subtly textured, dark background. Style should be a mix of Art Nouveau fluidity and modern vector graphic clean lines, optimized for direct textile printing. Flat graphic design elements, no shading complexity, high contrast, suitable for repeat pattern elements or singular centerpiece on apparel.
negative: blur, low quality, artifact, signature, text, watermark, logo, messy, complex shading, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, grainy
